TipCheckUpdate: Click to check for a new version
PhSystemPrompt: The AI's role / guidance for this conversation (optional)
EmptyStateSubtitle: Start a conversation with NVIDIA's free LLMs.
PhMessageInput: Type a message…   (Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line)
SendBlockedByOther: Generating a response in '{0}'. You can send once it finishes.
Example1: Summarize a CSV file with a short Python script
Example2: Translate this sentence into natural English
Example3: Explain the difference between concurrency and parallelism with examples
Example4: Make me a packing checklist for a trip
ApiKeyHelp: Sign in to build.nvidia.com and use 'Get API Key' on a model page to create an nvapi- key, then paste it here. The key is encrypted and stored only on this PC.
DefaultModelId: Default model ID for new chats
DefaultSystemPrompt: Default system prompt for new chats
PhDefaultSystemPrompt: (optional) e.g. You are a friendly assistant.
SendOnEnter: Send with Enter (off: Ctrl+Enter sends, Enter inserts a line break)
GenerateTitles: Auto-generate a conversation title after the first response
AutoCheckUpdates: Check for a new version on startup
UpdateHelp: When a new version is available, a notice appears at the top of the main window. 'Update now' downloads it from GitHub Releases, verifies the checksum, replaces the executable, and restarts.
PhAboutYou: e.g. I'm a developer. Answer in English.
PhResponseStyle: e.g. Be concise, include example code, no filler.
MinimizeToTray: Minimize to tray instead of quitting when Close (X) is pressed
Subtitle: {0}  ·  {1} messages
UpdateFailed: Update failed: {0} (you can download it directly from the Releases page)
NeedApiKeyStart: You need a build.nvidia.com API key to start. Enter it in Settings.
ClearMessagesMsg: Clear all messages in this conversation?
ModelsLoadFailed: Couldn't load the model list; using the default list. {0}
EmptyResponseHint: The model finished without producing content. Try 'Regenerate' below the response.
EmptyContentFilter: ⚠ The response was blocked by a content filter, so the body is empty.
EmptyLength: ⚠ The max output tokens were reached first, so the body is empty. Try raising Max tokens in advanced settings.
EmptyGeneric: ⚠ The model ended the response with no body. This may be a temporary upstream issue — try 'Regenerate'.
CopiedConversation: Copied the conversation to the clipboard.
AutoTitlePrompt: Generate a very short conversation title (3–6 words only) for the following user message, in the same language as the user. Output only the title text — no quotes, no period, no prefix.
HotkeyRegisterFailed: Failed to register the global hotkey ({0}). Another app may be using it. Choose a different combination in Settings.
ConvLoadReadError: Couldn't read the conversation history file. New conversations won't be saved this session. ({0})
ConvBackedUp: The conversation history file was corrupt and has been backed up: {0}
ConvCorrupt: The conversation history file is corrupt.
SetLoadReadError: Couldn't read the settings file, so settings won't be saved this session. ({0})
SetBackedUp: The settings file was corrupt and has been backed up: {0}
SetKeyDecryptFail: The stored API key can't be decrypted on this account. Re-enter the key to save it again.
UpdateNoExePath: Can't find the executable path, so the update can't proceed.
UpdateChecksumMismatch: The downloaded file's checksum didn't match, so the update was aborted.
UpdateReplaceFailed: Couldn't replace the executable. Move it to a folder you can write to and try again. ({0})
ApiKeyNotSet: The API key isn't set. Enter your build.nvidia.com API key in Settings.
HintCheckKey: (check that the API key is correct)
PresetTranslateEnBody: Translate the following into natural English:
PresetTranslateKoBody: Translate the following into natural Korean:
PresetSummarizeBody: Summarize the key points of the following concisely:
PresetCodeReviewBody: Review the following code and point out bugs and improvements:
PresetExplainBody: Explain the following concept simply, with examples a beginner can understand:
PresetGrammarBody: Correct the spelling and grammar of the following text, and tell me what you changed:
